upgrades.desc: All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit’s Shade token gain PRECISION (1).

upgrades.name: Psionic Transfer
upgrades.desc: Set a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may set all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating the Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has DISPLACEMENT.

upgrades.name: Phase Prism
upgrades.desc: When Artanis is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (0) effect from another Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit is removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves. Artanis' Activation ends.

upgrades.name: Hierarch’s Stand
upgrades.desc: When another Friendly Unit Within 8" is declared as the target of a Ranged Attack and this Unit is a valid target, redirect the attack to this Unit. This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the redirected attack. This Special Ability remains active until the End of the current Activation.

upgrades.name: Lightning Dash
upgrades.desc: After this Unit resolves a successful Charge action, it may declare a second Charge action against a different Enemy Unit, ignoring the restriction on Charging while Engaged. The Devastating Charge ability does not trigger a second time.

upgrades.name: Devastating Charge
upgrades.desc: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (6) 4+ effect.

upgrades.name: Leg Enhancements
upgrades.desc: This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

upgrades.name: Charge
upgrades.desc: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.

upgrades.desc: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.

upgrades.name: Precognition
upgrades.desc: This Unit is eligible to make an Evade roll against all attacks targeting it.

upgrades.name: Structure
upgrades.desc: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

upgrades.name: Khalai Ingenuity
upgrades.desc: Once per Round, when a Friendly Unit Within 4" of this Pylon uses a Special Ability that costs Psionic Energy, that ability’s PE cost is reduced by 1.

upgrades.name: Warp Conduit
upgrades.desc: Once per Round, the controlling player may deploy a Ground Unit from Reserves using this Pylon base as the Entry Edge. This Unit's Activation ends.

upgrades.name: Restoration
upgrades.desc: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.

upgrades.name: Force Field
upgrades.desc: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.

upgrades.name: Guardian Shield
upgrades.desc: All Ranged Attacks targeting a Friendly Unit Within 4" (Line of Sight is not required) are made with 1 fewer die in the Attack Pool.

upgrades.name: Solid-Field Projectors
upgrades.desc: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.

upgrades.desc:
The base of the Omega Worm counts as an Entry Edge. Each Round, Friendly Units with a combined Supply cost of 2 or less may be Deployed via this Entry Edge.

If a Friendly Leading model finishes a Move, Disengage, or Run action in base-to-base contact with the Omega Worm, the controlling player may remove that Unit from the battlefield and return it to Reserves.

upgrades.desc: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon’s S Dice is replaced by D6.

upgrades.name: Life Support
upgrades.desc: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 1 for each model in this Unit that is Within 4" of the damaged Unit.

upgrades.name: Advanced Medic Facilities
upgrades.desc: This Unit’s Supply Value counts as 0 when calculating the Supply Pool.

upgrades.name: Restoration
upgrades.desc: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.

upgrades.name: A-13 Flash Grenade Launcher
upgrades.desc: Increase the Optical Flare special ability's Range to 16".

upgrades.name: Stabilizer Medpacks
upgrades.desc: When this Unit resolves a Life Support or Medpack ability, treat it as having 1 additional model Within Range for calculating that ability's effects.

upgrades.name: Medpack
upgrades.desc: Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 4". Resolve the HEAL (X) effect for the targeted Unit, where X is the number of models in this Unit that are Within 4" of the target Unit.

upgrades.name: Optical Flare
upgrades.desc: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Until the End of the Round, apply DEBUFF Range (4) to that Unit’s Ranged Weapons. That Unit cannot benefit from LONG RANGE.

upgrades.name: Strike
upgrades.desc:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 1 | HIT: 5+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -

upgrades.name: Point Defense Laser
upgrades.desc: When another Friendly Unit Within 4" is targeted by a Ranged Attack without the INSTANT keyword, remove up to 2 dice from the Attack Pool. Then remove this Unit from the battlefield.

upgrades.name: Gliding
upgrades.desc: This model has DISPLACEMENT.

upgrades.name: Structure
upgrades.desc: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

upgrades.name: Stimpack
upgrades.desc: This Unit suffers NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (2). This Unit gains BUFF Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain PRECISION (3).

upgrades.name: Raiders Roll!
upgrades.desc: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve its Stimpack ability with the CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

upgrades.name: Rapid Reinforcements
upgrades.desc: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (10) effect from another Friendly Unit. No model may be set Within 8" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.
